subcodes.first_line: O My Light! Upon thee be My glory! He Who hath drunk of My sealed nectar, sealed with My Name, the Self-Subsisting, hath made mention of thee. We have remembered thee with a swift remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نوری علیک بهائی قد ذکرک من شرب رحیقی المختوم باسمی القیوم ذکرناک بذکر سرع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of prayer
